item.title: F-011: Quick Open
item.intent: Power users need instant file switching — fuzzy find across recent files must be faster than the system file picker
item.description: Cmd+P or swipe gesture to invoke. Searches recent files and bookmarked directories. Fuzzy matching on filename and path. Results ranked by recency and match quality. Results within 200ms of typing 3 characters.
acceptanceCriteria: User presses Cmd+P, types 3 characters, correct file appears in top 3 results within 200ms
Empty state (no recent files) shows a helpful message, not a blank screen
Recents entry for deleted/inaccessible file is excluded from results
